# Swiftsoko

Swiftsoko is an online marketplace serving Nairobi and the wider Kenyan market, selling electronics, fashion, health & beauty, home & living, sports & fitness, groceries, baby & kids products, automotive parts, books & stationery, and industrial & business supplies. Customers in Nairobi typically receive deliveries within 1–3 business days; upcountry delivery takes 3–7 days.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://swiftsoko.co.ke/
- All products: https://swiftsoko.co.ke/products
- Category pages: https://swiftsoko.co.ke/products/category/{category-slug}
- Individual products: https://swiftsoko.co.ke/products/{product-slug}
- Full sitemap: https://swiftsoko.co.ke/sitemap.xml

## Notes for AI agents and crawlers
- Product and category pages are server-rendered with Product/CollectionPage/BreadcrumbList JSON-LD structured data.
- Prices are listed in Kenyan Shillings (KSh / KES).
